title: Assistants and deputies included
doc_html:
Art. 109.  Assistants and deputies included

Unless the context clearly indicates the contrary, official titles, such as clerk of court, district attorney, and sheriff, include assistants and deputies.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
